title: Public Launch
description: Bluesky ends the invitation-only period and opens to the public.

title: Brazil X Ban
description: X is suspended in Brazil, causing a surge of millions of Brazilian users joining Bluesky.

title: US Election Exodus
description: Post-US election migration from X drives another major user surge and cultural shift.

title: Reach 25M Users
description: Bluesky officially hits the 25 million registered users milestone.

title: Reach 30M Users
description: The platform continues its rapid trajectory, crossing 30 million users.

title: New Block System
description: Changes to the blocking mechanism on X drive another massive wave of migration.

title: Reach 40M Users
description: Bluesky enters 2026 with strong momentum, surpassing 40 million registered users.

title: Reach 45M Users
description: Bluesky crosses the 45 million registered users mark, continuing its steady growth throughout 2026.
